'''hazhufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oopsortunity|oopsortunity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oopsortunity|oopsortunity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hazhufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzhifith|hæzhifith]] || [[word:hæzhifij|hæzhifij]] || [[word:hæzhifish|hæzhifish]] || [[word:hæzhifi|hæzhifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhuzhufuth|hazhuzhufuth]] || [[word:hazhuzhufuj|hazhuzhufuj]] || [[word:hazhuzhufush|hazhuzhufush]] || [[word:hazhuzhufu|hazhuzhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhufuth|hazhufuth]] || [[word:hazhufuj|hazhufuj]] || [[word:hazhufush|hazhufush]] || [[word:hazhufu|hazhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhuffuth|hazhuffuth]] || [[word:hazhuffuj|hazhuffuj]] || [[word:hazhuffush|hazhuffush]] || [[word:hazhuffuf|hazhuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazhufuthu|hazhufuthu]] || [[word:hazhufuju|hazhufuju]] || [[word:hazhufushu|hazhufushu]] || [[word:hazhufuku|hazhufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazhufuth|hazhufuth]] || [[word:hazhufuj|hazhufuj]] || [[word:hazhufush|hazhufush]] || [[word:hazhufu|hazhufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazhufuthul|hazhufuthul]] || [[word:hazhufujul|hazhufujul]] || [[word:hazhufushul|hazhufushul]] || [[word:hazhufukul|hazhufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazhufuthuthu|hazhufuthuthu]] || [[word:hazhufujuju|hazhufujuju]] || [[word:hazhufushushu|hazhufushushu]] || [[word:hazhufuku|hazhufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazhufuthun|hazhufuthun]] || [[word:hazhufujun|hazhufujun]] || [[word:hazhufushun|hazhufushun]] || [[word:hazhufukun|hazhufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazhufuthuoro|hazhufuthuoro]] || [[word:hazhufujuoro|hazhufujuoro]] || [[word:hazhufushuoro|hazhufushuoro]] || [[word:hazhufukuoro|hazhufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
